name: Kevin Lake
bio: Kevin Lake serves as the Panola County Sheriff, leading law enforcement operations from the county seat of Carthage. Sheriff Lake oversees patrol, criminal investigations, and detention services, ensuring the safety of Panola County residents and the energy industry workers in the area.
campaignPromises: Protect oil and gas industry infrastructure from theft and vandalism
Enhance drug interdiction on Highway 59 and other major routes
Ensure the county jail operates safely and within budget
Recruit and train top-quality law enforcement professionals
Strengthen neighborhood watch programs across Panola County
